## What Is ZeroClaw Support?

ZeroClaw Support is School of Freelancing's done-for-you service for ZeroClaw, a personal AI assistant agent runtime that connects to LLM providers including Anthropic, OpenAI, Ollama, and around 20 others. We handle the setup, configuration, and troubleshooting of your ZeroClaw installation and its provider integrations, so businesses and individuals can run it without hiring a full-time AI engineer.

## Key Takeaways

- **Format:** Remote, worldwide delivery
- **Turnaround:** 72 engineering hours over 3 days
- **Price:** $350 USD flat rate
- **Covers:** ZeroClaw installation and configuration, LLM provider connection and troubleshooting (Anthropic, OpenAI, Ollama, and others), remote issue resolution
- **Best for:** Businesses and individuals who want to run ZeroClaw as their personal AI assistant agent runtime without hiring a full-time AI engineer

## What's Included

- Fast issue resolution from an experienced personal AI agent runtime specialist
- Secure remote assistance over SSH or your preferred remote-access tool
- Installation and configuration of ZeroClaw as your personal AI assistant agent runtime
- Connecting and troubleshooting LLM provider integrations such as Anthropic, OpenAI, and Ollama
- Cost-effective, scoped engagements — no long-term contract required
- 24-hour post-installation support window after delivery

## Who This Is For

Businesses and individuals who want to run ZeroClaw as their personal AI assistant agent runtime and need help connecting
LLM providers, configuring the runtime, or troubleshooting issues, without hiring a full-time AI engineer.

## Frequently Asked Questions

Can you start immediately? +

Yes, in most cases we can begin as soon as the project requirements are confirmed.

Do you provide remote support? +

Yes. We provide secure remote support for servers, cloud infrastructure, and applications worldwide.

Which LLM providers can ZeroClaw connect to? +

ZeroClaw can talk to a wide range of LLM providers, including Anthropic, OpenAI, Ollama, and around 20 others. We help you configure and troubleshoot the provider connections you need.
